game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Gris is a hopeful young girl lost in her own world, dealing with a painful experience in her life. Her journey through sorrow is manifested in her dress, which grants new abilities to better navigate her faded reality. Gris is a hopeful young girl lost in her own world, dealing with a painful experience in her life. Her journey through sorrow is manifested in her dress, which grants new abilities to better navigate her faded reality. As the story unfolds, Gris will grow emotionally and see her world in a different way, revealing new paths to explore using her new abilities.

GRIS is a serene and evocative experience, free of danger, frustration or death. Players will explore a meticulously designed world brought to life with delicate art, detailed animation, and an elegant original score. Through the game light puzzles, platforming sequences, and optional skill-based challenges will reveal themselves as more of Gris’s world becomes accessible.

GRIS is an experience with almost no text, only simple control reminders illustrated through universal icons. The game can be enjoyed by anyone regardless of their spoken language.
game_info.description: Guide Gris, a young girl dealing with sorrow, through a fading world that comes alive as she gains new abilities through her magical dress. Collect colored orbs to unlock powers: red for double jump, blue for ground pound, and yellow for dash. Navigate platforms, solve light puzzles, and restore color to the world. There's no death or failure—only exploration and growth. Reach the top of the world to complete your emotional journey.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (←/→): Move left and right
Arrow Key (↑): Look up to see above
Space: Jump (press again in air for double jump with red ability)
Down Arrow (↓): Ground pound (smash through fragile platforms with blue ability)
Shift: Dash forward (quick movement with yellow ability)
Enter: Start the game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic movement and navigation through the early game without abilities. Validate that the player can move, jump, and interact with platforms correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move right and left, jump between platforms, test collision detection with platforms and boundaries. Verify gravity and physics work correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully navigates platforms, responds to inputs correctly, collisions work properly, and no errors occur during basic gameplay.

TEST_1.strategy: Move right and left, jump between platforms, test collision detection with platforms and boundaries. Verify gravity and physics work correctly.
TEST_1.expected: Player successfully navigates platforms, responds to inputs correctly, collisions work properly, and no errors occur during basic gameplay.

TEST_2.test_description: Test the complete winning path by collecting all ability orbs and reaching the final goal. This validates the full game progression from start to win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate to collect red orb (double jump), then blue orb (ground pound), then yellow orb (dash). Use each new ability to access previously unreachable areas. Finally, reach the top platform to win.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state after player reaches the goal with all abilities. Score reflects collected orbs. Win message displays correctly.

TEST_2.expected: Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state after player reaches the goal with all abilities. Score reflects collected orbs. Win message displays correctly.

TEST_3.test_description: Test ability unlocking and usage. Verify that abilities are locked initially, unlock upon collecting orbs, and function correctly when used.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Attempt to use abilities before collecting orbs (should not work). Collect each orb and verify ability becomes available. Test each ability multiple times.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Abilities are disabled until orbs are collected. After collection, abilities work as intended. UI correctly shows unlocked abilities.
TEST_3.description: Test ability unlocking and usage. Verify that abilities are locked initially, unlock upon collecting orbs, and function correctly when used.
TEST_3.strategy: Attempt to use abilities before collecting orbs (should not work). Collect each orb and verify ability becomes available. Test each ability multiple times.
TEST_3.expected: Abilities are disabled until orbs are collected. After collection, abilities work as intended. UI correctly shows unlocked abilities.

TEST_4.test_description: Test environmental progression and visual feedback. Verify that the world's color saturation increases as abilities are collected.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Observe initial desaturated world. Collect orbs one by one and verify visual changes occur. Check that platforms, background, and UI elements gain color.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: World starts gray/desaturated and becomes more colorful with each ability gained. Visual progression matches emotional journey theme.
TEST_4.description: Test environmental progression and visual feedback. Verify that the world's color saturation increases as abilities are collected.

TEST_5.test_description: Test edge cases and boundary conditions. Verify player cannot go off-screen, abilities have appropriate cooldowns, and game handles rapid input changes.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Try to move beyond screen boundaries, spam ability buttons, rapidly change directions, test all corners of the game world.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Player stays within bounds, abilities have proper cooldowns preventing spam, no crashes or visual glitches occur with rapid inputs.
TEST_5.description: Test edge cases and boundary conditions. Verify player cannot go off-screen, abilities have appropriate cooldowns, and game handles rapid input changes.
